BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: A blog post entry on Minnie's professional portfolio website

title.description: The heading/title of the blog post

slug.description: URL-friendly URL identifier for the blog post

excerpt.description: A short preview/summary of the post

content.description: Full body text of the blog post in markdown format

category.description: The category of the post (e.g., Leadership, Technology)

published.description: Whether the post is active and published

/posts/{postId}.description: Collection of blog posts published by the administrator
